intentSynonyms: clone a monitor with optional overrides in datadog
description: Clone an existing monitor to create a copy. Optionally override the name, query, message, or tags on the clone. The original monitor is not modified.

monitor_id.description: ID of the monitor to clone

name.description: Name for the cloned monitor. Defaults to "Clone of <original name>".

query.description: Override the query on the clone

message.description: Override the notification message on the clone

tags.description: Override tags on the clone. If omitted, inherits from original.
